Detail from the Bayeux Tapestry, depiction of Eustace II, with moustaches, inscribed in margin above in Latin: E...TIUS, possibly Latinised form of his name.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustache II de Boulogne於大約1020年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，他的父親Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne17歲，母親Mathilde gravin van Leuven22歲。他於1058年1月3日與Ide de Lorraine在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1054年被列為comte de boulogne et de lens。他去世於1087年在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustache II de Boulogne于大约1020年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅时，他的父亲Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne17岁，母亲Mathilde gravin van Leuven22岁。他于1058年1月3日与Ide de Lorraine在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1054年被列为comte de boulogne et de lens。他去世于1087年在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eustache
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.
King Anawrahta founds the first unified Burmese state at Pagan. He adopts Theravada Buddhism.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustache II de Boulogne was born about 1020, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, was 17 and his mother, Mathilde gravin van Leuven, was 22. He married Ide de Lorraine on 3 January 1058, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. In 1054, at the age of 35, his occupation is listed as comte de boulogne et de lens. He died in 1087, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustache II de Boulogne est né environ 1020, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mathilde gravin van Leuven, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ide de Lorraine le 3 janvier 1058, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. En 1054, à l’âge de 35 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est comte de boulogne et de lens. Il est décédé en 1087, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustache II de Boulogne um 1020 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne 17 und seine Mutter Mathilde gravin van Leuven 22. Er hat am 3. Januar 1058 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Ide de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1054, als er 35 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als comte de boulogne et de lens aufgeführt. Er starb 1087 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustache II de Boulogne è nato il circa 1020 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde gravin van Leuven, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ide de Lorraine il 3 gennaio 1058, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1054, all'età di 35 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come comte de boulogne et de lens. Morì nel 1087, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustache II de Boulogneが約1020年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Eustache Ier comte de Boulogneは17歳，母Mathilde gravin van Leuvenは22歳であった。1058年1月3日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーでIde de Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1054年，35歳の時，職業はcomte de boulogne et de lensと記録されている。彼は1087年に故郷で68歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustache II de Boulogne(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde gravin van Leuven(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1058년 1월 3일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 Ide de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1054년, 35세의 나이로 그의 직업은 comte de boulogne et de lens이었다. 그는 1087년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustache II de Boulogne nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde gravin van Leuven, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ide de Lorraine em 3 de janeiro de 1058, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1054, com 35 anos, sua profissão aparece como comte de boulogne et de lens. Ele faleceu em 1087, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustache II de Boulogne родился около 1020 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde gravin van Leuven, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ide de Lorraine 3 января 1058 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1054 году, в возрасте 35 лет,  он работал по профессии comte de boulogne et de lens. Он умер в 1087 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

sm.from 1049 to 1088: mai le 1049 e o'o I le 1088

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustache II de Boulogne nació aproximadamente 1020, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mathilde gravin van Leuven, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ide de Lorraine el 3 de enero de 1058, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1054, a la edad de 35 años, su ocupación registrada era comte de boulogne et de lens. Murió en 1087, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
